description: Eppo is a feature flagging and experimentation platform. It provides SDKs for local experiment assignment and a warehouse-native analytics platform for experiment analysis.
summary: geteppo.com exposes a documented REST API at `https://eppo.cloud/api/v1` authenticated by an `X-Eppo-Token` API key, plus an SDK-backed HTTP configuration service used by Eppo client/server SDKs with SDK keys or client tokens; no GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
